mechanism_narrative: Low federal funds rates reduce equity discount rates, compressing valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next twenty trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in low-rate periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate decline below eight percent signals rapid labor market recovery, boosting corporate earnings expectations and driving positive equity returns over sixty days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in more than 55% of instances when the trigger condition fires, invalidating the recovery signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer demand recovery, leading to positive equity returns through improved revenue forecasts.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 20-day returns with statistical significance at the 90% confidence level.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth above historical trend during economic expansion phases signals capacity utilization improvements, driving positive short-term equity momentum.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power with Rank IC below 0.01 during expansion regimes, or 5-day forward returns show no significant correlation with INDPRO momentum.

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation combined with stagnant policy rates triggers expectations of future monetary tightening, compressing equity multiples and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive forward returns occur in more than 60% of triggered instances, contradicting the tightening expectation mechanism.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising total employment and falling unemployment rate indicates structural labor market tightening, boosting wage growth and consumer spending forecasts.
failure_condition: Interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant in out-of-sample tests, or 60-day returns are negative in majority of divergence episodes.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth momentum directly correlates with corporate revenue trajectories, generating positive short-term market returns through earnings revision cycles.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no significant correlation with GDP growth momentum, with t-statistic remaining below 1.5 across rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production alongside declining housing starts signals broad-based economic slowdown, prompting risk-off equity positioning and negative returns.
failure_condition: Negative signal fails to predict negative 20-day returns with greater than 55% accuracy in recessionary regimes, or Rank IC exceeds 0.02 positively.
